codeReview.summary: The fix correctly restores the canonical empty-string actor contract and explicitly tags the true service-generated CreateWork paths with CreatedBy="service". The existing request-scoped MCP provenance flow is preserved, and the targeted service/supervisor test suites are green.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The provenance regression tests still stop at helper-level CreatedBy/actor mapping and session selection; they do not actually drive a work mutation through session.CallTool or the StreamableHTTP mutation path.

summary: PASS: the fix resolves the empty-string CreatedBy contract mismatch by labeling service-generated callsites explicitly and preserving the existing request-scoped MCP provenance behavior.
